name: Capital Investment Appraisal — NPV, IRR, Payback & Profitability Index
subtitle: Financial Engineering | Project Finance — ICMA Financial Appraisal Guide, ISO 15686-5:2017 (LCC)

inScope: Capital Investment Appraisal — NPV, IRR, Payback & Profitability Index
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Terminal / Salvage Value at End of Life
Annual Cash Flow Escalation Rate (inflation adj.)

standards.name: Capital Investment Appraisal — NPV, IRR, Payback & Profitability Index
standards.description: Capital Investment Appraisal — NPV, IRR, Payback & Profitability Index — Financial Engineering, Project Finance

formulas.expression: discount_rate_pct / 100; g = annual_escalation_pct / 100; PVA = (Math.abs(g - r) < 0.001) ? CF_after_tax_usd * project_life_yr / (1+r) : CF_after_tax_usd * (1 - Math.pow((1+g)/(1+r), project_life_yr)) / (r - g); PV_salvage = salvage_value_usd / Math.pow(1+r, project_life_yr); NPV_usd = PVA + PV_salvage - initial_investment_usd
formulas.reference: NPV = Σ CF_t/(1+r)^t - CAPEX — ICMA financial appraisal

formulas.expression: let irr = 0.10; for(let i=0;i<1000;i++){let f=-initial_investment_usd; let df=0; for(let t=1;t<=project_life_yr;t++){let cf=CF_after_tax_usd*Math.pow(1+annual_escalation_pct/100,t-1); f+=cf/Math.pow(1+irr,t); df-=t*cf/Math.pow(1+irr,t+1);} if(t===project_life_yr) f+=salvage_value_usd/Math.pow(1+irr,project_life_yr); let di=f/df; irr-=di; if(Math.abs(di)<1e-8) break;} IRR_pct = irr * 100   // [%] IRR — Newton-Raphson Iterative (MaxIter=1000) Reference: IRR: Newton-Raphson convergence — financial mathematics §3; MaxIter=1000 guard per SectorCalc standard

formulas.reference: PBP = CAPEX / annual CF — simple payback

formulas.expression: let cumPV = 0; let DPBP = project_life_yr; for(let t=1; t<=project_life_yr; t++){cumPV += CF_after_tax_usd * Math.pow(1 + annual_escalation_pct/100, t-1) / Math.pow(1 + discount_rate_pct/100, t); if(cumPV >= initial_investment_usd){DPBP = t - 1 + (initial_investment_usd - (cumPV - CF_after_tax_usd / Math.pow(1+discount_rate_pct/100, t))) / (CF_after_tax_usd / Math.pow(1+discount_rate_pct/100, t)); break;}} DPBP_yr = DPBP   // [years] Discounted Payback Period (DPBP) Reference: Discounted payback — IAS 36 impairment; cumulative PV reaching CAPEX

formulas.reference: PI = PV of cash inflows / CAPEX

warnings.message: IRR > 50%: unusually high — verify cash flow projections for optimism bias; conduct sensitivity analysis on key revenue assumptions
Discounted payback > 70% of project life: late-life cash flow dependence — project is sensitive to abandonment risk; assess terminal value robustness
Profitability Index 1.0–1.1: marginal value creation — compare alternative uses of capital; opportunity cost may be higher
High escalation assumption (>5%): NPV is sensitive to inflation forecast — run downside at g=0% and upside at g=3% for scenario range
Large salvage value (>30% of CAPEX): NPV materially dependent on terminal residual — verify asset market and contractual exit options before committing

verdictText.warn: PASS — High Utilization: Peer Review Required

legalNotice: ⚠ Engineering decision support only — verify before use. This is a technical simulation, not professional engineering advice.
